description_long: This is an ornate, three-armed brass candelabrum with a central stem and three candle holders, each supporting a tall, white taper candle. The base is wide, rounded, and decorated with intricate floral engravings, providing stability and a touch of elegance. The arms curve outward symmetrically from the central column, each ending in a circular candle tray with a short cylindrical holder. The brass surface has a slightly aged patina, giving it a classic, antique appearance. The candles are unlit, with visible wicks and smooth, unblemished wax. This decorative piece is reminiscent of traditional European candle holders often found in historic urban interiors or on outdoor café tables.
description: An ornate brass candelabrum with three curved arms, each holding a tall, white taper candle. The base is wide and engraved, giving the piece an antique, elegant look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three candle arms symmetrically spread and the detailed engravings on the base.
description_view_1: Side view with the arms aligned, making the candelabrum appear narrower and showing the profile of the candle holders.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the three arms and the ornate base, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the arms in alignment and the profile of the candle holders.
